management.title: Technical Leadership - QA Automation & AI
management.description: Leading QA automation and AI initiatives as Staff Automation & AI Engineer. Spearheading Quality Mate platform development, AI-powered testing solutions, and mentoring automation engineers across enterprise projects.
keyResponsibilities: Lead AI-powered automation initiatives and platform development
Architect test automation frameworks and best practices
Mentor and guide QA automation engineers on technical excellence
Drive adoption of Robot Framework, Playwright, and AI testing tools
Design and implement CI/CD pipelines for automated testing
Establish quality metrics and continuous improvement strategies
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on quality standards
achievements: Developed Quality Mate AI-powered testing platform
Launched Test League gamification and QC Tube knowledge hub
Created 5 Custom GPTs ecosystem for QA support
Achieved Employee of the Year 2024 - Quality Team
Implemented AI testing agents reducing manual effort by 40%

management.title: Team Lead - QA Automation
management.description: Led QA automation team responsible for test framework development, automation strategy, and quality assurance across multiple government platforms. Established automation standards and best practices.
keyResponsibilities: Led team of 8 QA automation engineers
Designed automation strategy and framework architecture
Implemented Robot Framework enterprise adoption
Conducted code reviews and technical mentoring
Managed test automation roadmap and sprint planning
Coordinated with development teams on quality integration
Delivered training sessions on automation tools and practices
achievements: Reduced test execution time by 60% through parallel execution
Established Robot Framework as standard across 15+ projects
Trained team on Playwright and modern automation tools
Built reusable test library reducing duplication by 50%

management.title: Automation Lead - Enterprise Projects
management.description: Senior automation engineer leading test automation implementation for government platforms including SABER, MAZAD, and other large-scale projects. Focused on framework development and team enablement.
keyResponsibilities: Led automation implementation for 10+ enterprise projects
Mentored junior and mid-level automation engineers
Developed custom automation frameworks and libraries
Integrated test automation with Azure DevOps pipelines
Conducted automation workshops and knowledge sharing
Reviewed and approved automation test designs
achievements: Reduced regression testing cycle from 5 days to 6 hours
Mentored 6 engineers advancing to senior roles
Built API testing framework used across department

management.title: Hackathon Organizer & Mentor
management.description: Led organization of Thiqah Hackathon (Nov 2024), mentoring cross-functional teams on AI implementation and ensuring high-quality prototypes through effective collaboration.
keyResponsibilities: Organized and coordinated hackathon logistics and execution
Mentored multiple teams on AI/ML implementation strategies
Provided technical guidance on LLM integration and architecture
Facilitated innovation and creative problem-solving sessions
Evaluated team prototypes and provided constructive feedback
Fostered collaborative environment across departments
achievements: Mentored 8 teams to working AI prototype completion
Facilitated cross-functional collaboration and knowledge sharing
